title: Theo's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: Little Theo feels scared at bedtime until he discovers the magical comfort of the stars watching over him, learning that nighttime can be peaceful and safe.

pages.text: Theo's bedtime was here. His mommy tucked him in his cozy bed. But Theo felt scared. The room looked so dark and big. "I don't want to sleep," whispered Theo. "The dark makes me feel worried." Mommy sat beside him and smiled. "Let's look out your window together," she said gently.

illustration.description: A little boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes sitting up in bed looking worried, with his mother beside him in a softly lit bedroom with dreamy purple and blue gradients, gentle moonlight streaming through a window, soft watercolor style with floating clouds visible outside
illustration.alt: Theo looking scared in bed with his mother comforting him

pages.text: Theo and Mommy looked up at the night sky. Sparkly stars twinkled like tiny friends! "Look, Theo," said Mommy. "The stars are saying hello to you." Theo's round blue eyes grew wide with wonder. "Hello, stars!" he whispered. The biggest star seemed to wink at him. Theo felt a warm, happy feeling in his heart. Maybe the dark wasn't so scary after all.

illustration.description: A boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes looking out a window with his mother, glowing stars twinkling in the night sky with dreamy purple and blue gradients, soft watercolor style with ethereal atmosphere and pastel palette, stars appearing to sparkle and wink
illustration.alt: Theo and his mother looking at twinkling stars through the window

pages.text: "The stars watch over you all night," Mommy explained. "They keep you safe while you dream." Theo snuggled deep into his blankets. He felt cozy and protected. The glowing stars outside made gentle shadows that danced on his wall like friendly animals. "Good night, stars," yawned Theo. "Thank you for watching me." His eyes felt heavy and sleepy. With the stars as his nighttime friends, Theo drifted off to peaceful dreams.

illustration.description: A sleepy boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes peacefully sleeping in bed with a gentle smile, glowing stars visible through the window casting soft shadows on the wall, dreamy purple and blue gradients throughout the room, floating clouds, soft watercolor style with ethereal atmosphere and round sleepy faces in the star patterns
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully with stars shining through his window

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: How did Theo feel at bedtime?
questions.explanation: Theo felt scared because the dark room looked big and made him feel worried.

questions.question: What did Theo and Mommy look at together?
questions.explanation: Theo and Mommy looked at the sparkly stars in the night sky through his window.

questions.question: What do the stars do while Theo sleeps?
questions.explanation: Mommy told Theo that the stars watch over him all night and keep him safe while he dreams.

questions.question: How did Theo feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Theo felt peaceful and sleepy because the stars made him feel safe and protected.
